text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, this way, please. The tea is ready to be
served.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As a change of pace, I've been invited to the
Mejiro household for tea.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
All of us getting together for tea like this reminds
me of when we were little.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
It really does. Oh! Do you remember the height
tree?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
That tree in the back garden? Oh yes, that's
where Ardan was gracious enough to mark our
heights on the trunk.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
You really shot up fast when you were little,
Bright!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, Dober barely grew at all, and kept
standing on her tiptoes to make herself look
taller...
Didn't you stumble over at one point?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Are you trying to embarrass me?! Still, I do remember Ardan being the one who comforted me when that happened.

text_block_list.name: Young Dober
text_block_list.text: Waaah! Owwwieee!

text_block_list.name: Young Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I'm just going to give you some first aid,
okay? ...See? It doesn't hurt. Once I'm finished,
shall we go and have some sweet tea?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You always used to prepare a cup of tea for me
when I cried, Ardan. Your tea was subtly sweet,
and its taste really put me at ease.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for saying that. ...But thinking back on
it now, perhaps I should have added a little more
sugar, since you were a child.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
My palate was so accustomed to subtle flavors at
the time, it never occurred to me... What do you
think of your tea, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Hehe, that's a relief.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Really, though. Just because my trainer's here
doesn't mean you have to talk exclusively about
me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But we hardly ever get the chance to talk about
you! Oh! Say, Ardan, do you remember that time I
got lost in the manor...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Things are going well, with everyone having a
great time reminiscing, until I excuse myself to
use the restroom...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although I try to head back the way I came, I
somehow wind up in the kitchen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer? Where have you gone?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As relief washes over me, I happen to remember
the story from earlier.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Do you remember that time I got lost in the manor and you came to find me? It was freezing, but you searched high and low for me...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
And then the next day, you were sick in bed. I felt
terrible! I think I'm pretty sure I cried my eyes
out...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Yes, if memory serves, you spent so much time at
Ardan's bedside that the maid scolded you. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Maaan... Yeah, knowing how I was back then, I
wouldn't have let her out of my sight.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Oh! There you are, Trainer. What a relief!
choice_data_list: Sorry for making you come find me.
Sorry for making you come find me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I'll have you know that I've been the Mejiro
family's undisputed hide-and-seek champion for a
very long time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
After all, much of my youth was spent
convalescing within the manor... The halls are vast
and intricate, but before I knew it, I had the
layout committed to memory.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
As such... no matter how many times you lose
your way in here, I can say with confidence that
I'll find you.
choice_data_list:
Thanks. I don't see myself getting lost over and
over, though.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Well, that's unfortunate. I was planning to serve
you a cup of extra-sweet tea in the event I found
you lost and crying, all by yourself. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Oh? Things certainly look lively outside.
choice_data_list:
Looks like everyone stepped out into the
garden.

Looks like everyone stepped out into the
garden.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
It looks as if they're searching for the height tree.
Seeing them doing that makes me feel as if I've
stepped back in time to when we were all
children.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I doubt that any of them will get lost again... but
I'm not sure whether that makes me happy or...
sad...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I doubt that any of them will get lost again... but
I'm not sure whether that makes me happy or...
sad...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Oh my. Hehe... ♪ Well, fortunately for me, there's
still a sweet little someone getting lost like a
child.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Which reminds me... Trainer, I believe you
nodded off in your office the other day, didn't
you?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
The sight of you snoozing away... was rather
adorable, I must say.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Heeey! You guys! We found the tree!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...! Hehe... Thank you for letting us know.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
You know, they've always had a habit of
overexerting themselves. Sometimes for pride,
sometimes to realize their dreams... And I know
how they feel painfully well.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
That's why I wish to help them. It's only by a little,
but I am the oldest, so I'd like to be their role
model...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Heeey! You guys! We found the tree!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
That's Ryan for you, yelling away at the top of her
lungs... Hehehe.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Let's be on our way, Trainer. I expect they're
waiting for us.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day ends up being a very special one, as I get
to glimpse a different side of Mejiro Ardan!
